creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
After updating to 5.2.44, the VM dies after loading with the this error:
Failed to open a session for the virtual machine Win7.

Failed to load unit 'vga' (VERR_SSM_LOADED_TOO_MUCH).

Result Code: NS_ERROR_FAILURE (0x80004005)
Component: ConsoleWrap
Interface: IConsole {872da645-4a9b-1727-bee2-5585105b9eed}

The kmod was rebuilt with the current kernel sources. The VM was in a "Paused" state and was reloading, not a boot from scratch.

System is 12-STABLE r362181 on an amd64 system.

After rolling bask to 2.34_4, the VM resumes normally.
